attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WERP.OFFER_ATTRIB_ACV_RTNR_ERP_KEY
,WERP.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WERP.ATTRIBUTION_SS_CD 
,WERP.DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WERP.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY
,WERP.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
,WERP.ATTRIBUTION_PCT  
,WERP.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID 
,WERP.SALES_MOTION_CD
,WERP.SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
,WERP.SK_TRX_ID_INT 
,WERP.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
,WERP.TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,WERP.PRODUCT_KEY
,WERP.DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY
,WERP.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
,WERP.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT  
,WERP.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,WERP.START_TV_DTM
,WERP.END_TV_DTM  
,WERP.EDW_CREATE_DTM 
,WERP.EDW_CREATE_USER
,WERP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM 
,WERP.EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$WORKDB.W_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB WERP
WHERE DML_TYPE='I'
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB_TV NERP
WHERE NERP.OFFER_ATTRIB_ACV_RTNR_ERP_KEY = WERP.OFFER_ATTRIB_ACV_RTNR_ERP_KEY
AND   NERP.START_TV_DTM = WERP.START_TV_DTM
)

SELECT
WERP.OFFER_ATTRIB_ACV_RTNR_ERP_KEY
,WERP.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WERP.ATTRIBUTION_SS_CD 
,WERP.DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WERP.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY
,WERP.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
,WERP.ATTRIBUTION_PCT  
,WERP.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID 
,WERP.SALES_MOTION_CD
,WERP.SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
,WERP.SK_TRX_ID_INT 
,WERP.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
,WERP.TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,WERP.PRODUCT_KEY
,WERP.DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY
,WERP.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
,WERP.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT  
,WERP.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,WERP.EDW_CREATE_DTM 
,WERP.EDW_CREATE_USER
,WERP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM 
,WERP.EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB_TV WERP
WHERE END_TV_DTM='3500/01/01 00:00:00'
